touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Abigail Ali at RidgeCube introducing our pipeline visibility solution. No response received.
Attempted cold call to Abigail Ali. Left voicemail highlighting how we help sales teams gain pipeline visibility. No callback received.
LinkedIn message sent to Abigail referencing RidgeCube's growth and our pipeline forecasting capabilities. No response.

14-minute qualification call with Abigail Ali. She expressed interest in improving forecast accuracy and pipeline visibility for her team. Currently evaluating solutions including Clari. Discussed team size and basic requirements.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a pipeline visibility solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're missing our forecasts by 20-30% each quarter and leadership is pushing for better visibility into what's real in the pipeline.

questions_asked.question: How many sales reps would be using this?
questions_asked.answer: About 10 reps on the team currently.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute discovery call with Abigail. Deep dive into current forecasting challenges and pain points. She mentioned they're also looking at Clari but concerned about complexity. Discussed use cases around pipeline visibility and automation needs. Abigail seems engaged but is the only stakeholder involved so far.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Clari's?
questions_asked.answer: We offer unlimited automation at our tier, while Clari typically charges per automation workflow. Our users find it more flexible for custom pipeline rules.

questions_asked.question: Who else on your team should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: I'm heading this up for now. I'll bring in the team once we get further along.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place before end of quarter, so probably 4-6 weeks.

objections: Need to understand total cost compared to Clari
next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation for following week
Abigail to review automation requirements internally

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message from Abigail thanking us for the discovery call and confirming she's reviewing our materials. Positive engagement.
Follow-up call attempt to confirm technical eval logistics. Abigail didn't pick up, sent text confirming the meeting is still on her calendar.

31-minute technical evaluation with Abigail. Walked through pipeline visibility dashboards, forecast accuracy features, and automation capabilities. She asked detailed questions about integration with their Salesforce instance and reporting flexibility. Still no other stakeholders involved. She seemed impressed with the unlimited automation tier.

questions_asked.question: How long does the Salesforce integration typically take to set up?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers are up and running within 2-3 days. We handle the configuration for you.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the pipeline health scoring based on our own criteria?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. The unlimited automation tier lets you build custom scoring models based on any fields in your CRM.

questions_asked.question: Would it make sense to bring in your RevOps lead or CRO to see this as well?
questions_asked.answer: Let me get through the proposal stage first, then I'll loop them in if needed.

next_steps: Abigail to discuss internally with team

touches.ai_summary: 26-minute proposal review call with Abigail. Presented $10,350 list price for 10 seats with unlimited automation. She expressed concern about budget and mentioned Clari came in lower. Discussed value drivers and agreed to explore pricing flexibility. Still single-threaded with no executive involvement.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the pricing? Clari's quote came in lower.
questions_asked.answer: Let me talk to my manager about what we can do. What budget range were you targeting?

questions_asked.question: What's included in the implementation and training?
questions_asked.answer: Full setup, Salesforce integration, and two training sessions for your team are all included.

objections: Competitive pressure from Clari on pricing
next_steps: Abigail to confirm budget with leadership

touches.ai_summary: 33-minute exec meeting with Abigail - though no actual executive from RidgeCube joined. Discussed revised proposal at $7,400 (28.5% discount). Abigail seemed relieved at the pricing but couldn't commit without final approval. Reviewed ROI justification and implementation timeline. Some concern about pushing this through without broader buy-in.

questions_asked.question: Will you need sign-off from your CRO or CFO on this investment?
questions_asked.answer: I have approval authority up to $10k, so we should be fine. I just need to finalize a few details.

questions_asked.question: If we sign this week, when can we go live?
questions_asked.answer: We can start implementation immediately, you'd be live within a week.

questions_asked.question: How are you feeling about this compared to the Clari option?
questions_asked.answer: I like your automation features better, and with this pricing it makes sense. Just want to make sure we're not missing anything.

next_steps: Abigail to review with team by end of week

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute pricing and terms call with Abigail. Reviewed contract details, payment terms, and finalized seat count at 10. She requested NET 30 payment terms. Discussed implementation kickoff. Abigail seemed ready to move forward but mentioned needing a few more days to 'get everything aligned internally.' No concrete close date confirmed.

questions_asked.question: Can we do NET 30 instead of payment upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can accommodate NET 30 for the first invoice.

next_steps: Abigail to return signed agreement by early next week
